evals.prompt: I have a raw idea for a new AI procurement copilot. Pressure test whether it survives realistic CAC, sales-cycle, and runway assumptions.
evals.expected_output: Routes to greenfield-product/startup-pressure-test because the real question is startup survivability rather than blueprinting.

evals.prompt: I have a raw idea for a product and need the first strategic blueprint, MVP shape, and architecture direction.
evals.expected_output: Routes to greenfield-product/product-blueprint because the request is strategy / MVP framing rather than startup teardown or downstream requirements.

evals.prompt: We already validated the blueprint. Turn it into a PRD with user stories, acceptance criteria, and edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Routes to greenfield-product/requirements-writer because the blueprint already exists and the remaining job is requirements definition.

evals.prompt: A validated PRD exists. Define the schema, API contracts, state flows, and infrastructure for v1.
evals.expected_output: Routes to greenfield-product/system-architect because the request is Stage 3 system design from an approved PRD.
